name: CPSAgentKit Docs Q&A Agent
description: Standalone Q&A agent that answers questions about Microsoft Copilot Studio using the CPSAgentKit knowledge and best-practice docs via the cpsagentkit-mcp server.

uiHints.placeholder: Ask about Copilot Studio constraints, anti-patterns, tools, multi-agent…
starterQuestions: What are the rules for tool descriptions?
When should I use a multi-agent pattern instead of topics?
How do I configure a Dataverse MCP connection?
What are the known pipeline-stability gotchas?
